title: GitLab Container Registry Garbage Collection and Blob Errors
dataSources: GitLab Registry or Rails logs with registry component (`sourcetype=gitlab:registry` normalized)
app: GitLab Omnibus logs via Universal Forwarder; Registry stdout JSON if containerized
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="gitlab:registry" OR (sourcetype="gitlab:application" component="registry")
| search "blob" AND ("delete" OR "gc" OR "garbage" OR "manifest unknown" OR "unknown blob")
| stats count, latest(_time) as last_seen by host, message_snippet
| sort -count
description: GC and blob errors risk storage exhaustion and failed image pulls for production clusters.
value: Catches registry maintenance failures that would break image pulls during deploys.
implementation: Ship registry logs to Splunk; truncate `message_snippet` at ingest. Page on sustained error bursts correlated with disk alerts.
visualization: Bar chart (error categories), Timeline of registry errors.
